steps.title: Translate the input
steps.content:
The input $x$ is the number of years after $1959$. When $x=5$, the year is
$$
1959+5=1964
$$

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: The function value gives the bank account's value in dollars. So $f(5)$ being approximately $249$ means the estimated value is about $249$ dollars in $1964$. The answer is B.
